title: Dry January Results: What We Learned
description: Community roundup of Dry January experiences and aggregated self-reported health outcomes (sleep, energy, weight, mood) across ~400 community members.
hook: 30 days changed everything. Here are the numbers.
keyMessage: Aggregated community data shows consistent improvements after 30 alcohol-free days.

strategy.keyMessage: Aggregated community data shows consistent improvements after 30 alcohol-free days.

creativePlan.hook: 30 days changed everything. Here are the numbers.

video.hook: 30 days changed everything. Here are the numbers.
video.body:
We surveyed 412 members at the end of Dry January. Sleep up 38%. Energy up 51%. Cravings down 67% by week three.

The outlier? Most surprising change wasn't physical — it was how much extra time everyone reported.
video.cta: Drop a 🌑 if you're in for next month's challenge.
hookBank: 30 days changed everything. Here are the numbers.
We tracked what 400+ people felt after 30 days off booze.
Most surprising stat from Dry January? Not what you'd guess.
30 days. 412 humans. One number that floored us.
video.bRollNotes: Cut to b-roll of the survey results overlay (charts) on every stat. Speed-ramp through the numbers; slow down on the time-reclaimed punchline.
video.voiceoverNotes: Energetic but matter-of-fact. Don't oversell. Let the numbers speak.

shotList.description: Hook delivered to camera, kitchen lighting
CTA delivered with the 🌑 emoji visible
